name: Lead-BUG72-Fix
script:
<!--
__() translatable function is not available in Client Script as it's evaluated differently
Using frappe.format __
-->
frappe.ui.form.on('Lead', {
    refresh: function(frm) {
        // Add custom button to create Sample Request
        frm.add_custom_button(__('Sample Request'), function() {
            create_sample_request(frm);
        }, __('Create'));
    }
});

function create_sample_request(frm) {
    // Call the server function that creates Sample Request with default sample row
    // This fixes BUG 72 - "Data missing in table Samples"
    frappe.call({
        method: 'amb_w_tds.api.utils.create_sample_request_from_lead',
        args: {
            lead_name: frm.doc.name
        },
        freeze: true,
        callback: function(r) {
            if (!r.exc) {
                frappe.msgprint('Sample Request created: ' + r.message);
                frappe.set_route('Form', 'Sample Request AMB', r.message);
            }
        },
        error_callback: function(r) {
            frappe.msgprint('Error creating Sample Request: ' + r.message);
        }
    });
}
